card_description: Barry is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick explores the "DNA Memory" theory after speaking with a researcher (Barry), suggesting that his 3-74 experience was the "disinhibition" of an 1800-year-old Christian personality ("Thomas") to solve the "maze" of the Xerox letter."
